arts.ttl: Maresca faces transfer threat as Liverpool pursue Chelsea 'UNTOUCHABLE'
arts.sum: Colwill, 22, has been linked with a move to Anfield for several years and Arne Slot’s side have rekindled their interest in the England international, according to TEAMtalk, as they look to sign a player capable of playing at centre-back and left-back. Liverpool reportedly remain interested in signing Chelsea defender Levi Colwill, although they are unlikely to complete a deal during the 2025 summer transfer window.
